title: Beijing Travel Tips for Foreign Tourists
metaDescription: Essential travel tips for visiting Beijing. Learn about local customs, transport, and key attractions for a smooth trip.

sections.heading: h1
sections.content: Welcome to Beijing! This ancient capital offers incredible history and modern energy. Prepare for your trip with these practical tips to make your visit comfortable and memorable.

sections.heading: h2
sections.content: Getting Around & Payment: Beijing's subway is efficient, affordable, and easy to navigate. Always carry some cash, but also set up a mobile payment app like Alipay or WeChat Pay for convenience.

sections.heading: h3
sections.content: Cultural Etiquette & Tips: Be respectful at historical sites. Try local foods like Peking Duck. Always have your hotel address written in Chinese for taxi drivers.

keyTakeaways: Use Beijing's extensive subway system for efficient travel.
Set up mobile payment apps before your trip for easy transactions.
Have your destination address written in Chinese characters handy.
